text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm sitting in the cafeteria and<n>thinking hard
about tomorrow's<n>training, when...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uerghhh! This homework is so hard!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Enough to make you cry?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Calm down, Ticket. Use reason to<n>solve it, not
emotion.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
O-okay, that makes sense. Let's all<n>figure this
out together!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm leaving. I already did mine.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WHAT?! Already?! Am I that far<n>behind?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What are you having trouble with?<n>Let's look at
that problem first.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hold on! My head feels as mushy as<n>turf on a
rainy day!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What am I having trouble with? Idon't even know anymore!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...There's no hope for her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm... As long as you snap out of your<n>confusion
and focus, it's really not<n>that hard.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The only time she isn't confused is<n>when she's
running.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, that's it! You're right, Taishin.<n>Quick, Ticket.
Start running!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What? Run? Yay! ...Are you sure,<n>though?
Shouldn't I be studying?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Go on. Take a lap at full speed and<n>clear your
head.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Well, whatever works.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: A little while later...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm baaaaack!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Wow, there's a sparkle in her eye all<n>of a
sudden.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Mm, looks like she's back to normal.<n>Now, sit
down.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Start with the practice problem. Read it<n>clearly and
think hard before you<n>answer.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe this loudmouth is<n>quietly reading
for once...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Yes, that's correct.<n>Seems like
running really does help<n>you concentrate.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But for each question? There's no<n>way that'll
work during a test.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We can worry about that later. This is<n>good for
now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. You're always too nice toTicket, Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're one to talk. For all your<n>complaining, I
notice you're still<n>sticking around for moral
support.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?! It's not like I...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks, you two! I finally found<n>a way to
focus!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay! Now help me get through the<n>rest too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...Less talking, more studying. C'mon,<n>open your
book.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...The way you go full throttle always<n>inspires us.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And yet you too seem to derive so<n>much of your
energy from our support.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You truly are an enigma, Ticket.
